title: The Forgotten Passport
content: While preparing to leave for the airport, Daniel suddenly realized his passport was missing. Panic spread quickly as he searched every room in the apartment. He checked drawers, bags, and even pockets of old jackets. With only a few hours before departure, the situation felt increasingly serious. Finally, he discovered the passport inside a travel book he had been reading the previous evening. Relieved and slightly embarrassed, Daniel hurried to the airport. The experience taught him the importance of organizing essential documents well before travel day.
